name: Chicken Francaise #5
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the seasoned flour with salt, pepper, garlic powder, oregano, basil, and parsley.
2. Dip chicken breasts in egg wash, then coat them with seasoned flour.
3. Sauté chicken in hot butter until it is no longer pink.
4. To make lemon butter wine sauce:
- Melt butter in a pan.
- Add garlic and sauté until fragrant.
- Pour in white wine, salt, and pepper to taste.
- Thicken the sauce with a mixture of cornstarch and water.
